items.name: Wolf Spider Right Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Join The Group For More Cool Items! ----> https://www.roblox.com/communities/10147459/Solitary-UGC#!/store

Add a creepy crawly companion to your avatar with the Wolf Spider Right Shoulder Pet.
Perfect for dark outfits, spooky styles, and standout avatar looks.
Designed to sit naturally on the right shoulder with a realistic spider appearance.
